criteria_verification.criterion_text: graphiti.query event emitted for every context retrieval
criteria_verification.evidence: load_critical_context routes all internal queries through _instrumented_load() which calls _emit_graphiti_event() after every query. Tests TestGraphitiQueryEventEmission (2 tests) verify events are emitted per query and match search call count. TestFeatureBuildCommandBranch verifies the feature-build branch also emits events (5 total = 4 base + 1 feature-build).
criteria_verification.notes: load_critical_context routes all internal queries through _instrumented_load() which calls _emit_graphiti_event() after every query. Tests TestGraphitiQueryEventEmission (2 tests) verify events are emitted per query and match search call count. TestFeatureBuildCommandBranch verifies the feature-build branch also emits events (5 total = 4 base + 1 feature-build).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: query_type correctly identifies the retrieval type
criteria_verification.evidence: load_critical_context queries use query_type='context_loader'. load_critical_adrs uses query_type='adr_lookup'. Tests TestQueryTypeIdentification (2 tests) verify both types. TestLoadCriticalAdrs.test_successful_adr_retrieval also verifies query_type='adr_lookup'.
criteria_verification.notes: load_critical_context queries use query_type='context_loader'. load_critical_adrs uses query_type='adr_lookup'. Tests TestQueryTypeIdentification (2 tests) verify both types. TestLoadCriticalAdrs.test_successful_adr_retrieval also verifies query_type='adr_lookup'.

criteria_verification.evidence: _estimate_tokens() uses character-count heuristic (~4 chars/token). Called in _instrumented_load() and load_critical_adrs(). Tests TestTokensInjected (2 tests) verify positive for results, zero for empty. TestEstimateTokens (3 tests) directly tests the helper. TestLoadCriticalAdrs.test_successful_adr_retrieval verifies tokens_injected > 0.
criteria_verification.notes: _estimate_tokens() uses character-count heuristic (~4 chars/token). Called in _instrumented_load() and load_critical_adrs(). Tests TestTokensInjected (2 tests) verify positive for results, zero for empty. TestEstimateTokens (3 tests) directly tests the helper. TestLoadCriticalAdrs.test_successful_adr_retrieval verifies tokens_injected > 0.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Graphiti unavailability emits error event and falls back gracefully
criteria_verification.evidence: _instrumented_load() catches exceptions, emits event with status='error', and returns empty list. Tests TestGraphitiUnavailability (3 tests) verify error events for ConnectionError/TimeoutError and None graphiti. TestLoadCriticalAdrs.test_search_exception_emits_error_event verifies ADR error events.
criteria_verification.notes: _instrumented_load() catches exceptions, emits event with status='error', and returns empty list. Tests TestGraphitiUnavailability (3 tests) verify error events for ConnectionError/TimeoutError and None graphiti. TestLoadCriticalAdrs.test_search_exception_emits_error_event verifies ADR error events.

criteria_verification.evidence: _instrumented_load() logs 'Graphiti fallback: {fn_name} failed ({exc}), continuing with digest-only context' at WARNING level. TestWarningLogging.test_warning_logged_on_search_failure uses caplog to verify. TestLoadCriticalAdrs.test_adr_warning_logged_on_error verifies ADR warning.
criteria_verification.notes: _instrumented_load() logs 'Graphiti fallback: {fn_name} failed ({exc}), continuing with digest-only context' at WARNING level. TestWarningLogging.test_warning_logged_on_search_failure uses caplog to verify. TestLoadCriticalAdrs.test_adr_warning_logged_on_error verifies ADR warning.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Run continues with digest-only context when Graphiti unavailable
criteria_verification.evidence: When Graphiti is None or disabled, load_critical_context returns _create_empty_context(). When search fails, _instrumented_load returns []. Tests TestDigestOnlyFallback (2 tests) verify continuation. TestLoadCriticalAdrs (None, disabled, error) and TestLoadFeatureOverview (None, disabled, error) all verify graceful fallback.
criteria_verification.notes: When Graphiti is None or disabled, load_critical_context returns _create_empty_context(). When search fails, _instrumented_load returns []. Tests TestDigestOnlyFallback (2 tests) verify continuation. TestLoadCriticalAdrs (None, disabled, error) and TestLoadFeatureOverview (None, disabled, error) all verify graceful fallback.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests cover successful queries, error paths, and fallback
criteria_verification.evidence: 53 tests covering: successful queries (TestGraphitiQueryEventEmission, TestQueryTypeIdentification, TestTokensInjected, TestLatencyTracking, TestItemsReturnedCount, TestEventFieldsComplete, TestFeatureBuildCommandBranch, TestLoadCriticalAdrs success, TestLoadFeatureOverview success), error paths (TestGraphitiUnavailability with ConnectionError/TimeoutError/RuntimeError, TestLoadCriticalAdrs error, TestLoadFeatureOverview error, TestLoadRoleContext error), and fallback (TestDigestOnlyFallback, TestWarningLogging). Also covers helper functions (TestFilterValidResults, TestEstimateTokens, TestEmitGraphitiEventNoop), load_failed_approaches, load_role_context (all paths), and CriticalContext dataclass. Coverage: 98%.
criteria_verification.notes: 53 tests covering: successful queries (TestGraphitiQueryEventEmission, TestQueryTypeIdentification, TestTokensInjected, TestLatencyTracking, TestItemsReturnedCount, TestEventFieldsComplete, TestFeatureBuildCommandBranch, TestLoadCriticalAdrs success, TestLoadFeatureOverview success), error paths (TestGraphitiUnavailability with ConnectionError/TimeoutError/RuntimeError, TestLoadCriticalAdrs error, TestLoadFeatureOverview error, TestLoadRoleContext error), and fallback (TestDigestOnlyFallback, TestWarningLogging). Also covers helper functions (TestFilterValidResults, TestEstimateTokens, TestEmitGraphitiEventNoop), load_failed_approaches, load_role_context (all paths), and CriticalContext dataclass. Coverage: 98%.
